word: H2614 - חָנַק - chânaq - khaw-nak' - Hang self

sections.paragraph:
Original: חנק

Transliteration: chânaq

Phonetic: khaw-nak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to strangle, strangle oneself
    1. (Niphal) to strangle oneself
    2. (Piel) to strangle

Origin: a primitive root [compare H2596]

TWOT entry: 697

Part(s) of speech: Verb
